texto: Sometimes with the most intense pain a paralysis of sensibility occurs. The soul disintegrates--hence the deadly frost--the free power of the mind--the shattering, ceaseless wit of this kind of despair. There is no inclination for anything any more--the person is alone, like a baleful power--as he has no connection with the rest of the world he consumes himself gradually--and in accordance with his own principle he is--misanthropic and misotheos.
explicacao: Metáfora atribuída a Novalis: compara elementos do cotidiano para falar de passagem do tempo e prioridades. O trecho “Sometimes with the most intense pain a paralysis of sensibility occurs. The soul disintegrates--h…” usa imagem concreta para lembrar que reflexao, depression, pain pedem movimento e interpretação pessoal, em tom de pain e philosophy.
